text:
was a member of the Survey Corps under the command of Carlo Pikale.

Appearance

Rolf had short, light-colored hair, and a dark-colored beard. He appeared to be a man of average height.

Story

Shiganshina arc

Rolf participates in the expedition outside the Walls. During it, Kuklo, who sneaked into the expedition to see a Titan, accidentally fires off a green signal flare, attracting a Titan.

The Corps retreats, with the Titan pursuing Rolf's cart, which Kuklo was also riding. While Rolf focuses on getting back to the Walls, Kuklo tells Rolf to get onto a horse and explains his idea to blow up the cart to stop the Titan. Before they can execute this plan, the Titan pounces onto the cart, destroying the cart and capturing Kuklo and Rolf in the process. Seeing that Rolf is in danger, the Survey Corps heads back towards the Titan, attempting to rescue Rolf and Kuklo. Kuklo manages to escape, but Rolf is devoured.
